summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW features in iteration 5: Calendar Spread, Ratio Spread, AI Auto Strategy Selector, Push Notifications, and Tradovate integration. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified working.
passed_tests: Calendar Spread API creates 2-leg strategy with near/far expiry (POST /api/options/strategy/calendar-spread)
Calendar Spread supports both call and put option types
Ratio Spread API creates 1xN strategy with correct leg quantities (POST /api/options/strategy/ratio-spread)
Ratio Spread supports custom ratios (1x2, 1x3, etc.)
AI Auto Strategy Selector returns recommendation with confidence, direction, risk level (GET /api/options/auto-strategy/{symbol})
Auto Strategy works for all symbols (CL, BZ, NG)
Auto Strategy uses rule-based fallback when GPT-4o unavailable (source: rules)
Notifications GET returns list with unread_count
Notifications POST /test creates new notification with proper structure
Notifications POST /read-all marks all as read
Notifications POST /{id}/read marks single notification as read
Tradovate status endpoint returns is_configured, is_demo, connected fields
Tradovate shows SIM mode (simulation) when no API keys configured
Options backtest supports calendar_spread strategy type
Options backtest supports ratio_spread strategy type
Existing endpoints still work: system/status, options/chain, straddle, iron-condor, volatility
Frontend: Calendar Spread button visible in Options tab
Frontend: Ratio Spread button visible in Options tab
Frontend: AI Strategy Selector panel with Get AI Recommendation button
Frontend: AI recommendation displays with confidence %, direction bias, risk level, key factors
Frontend: Notification bell in header with unread count badge
Frontend: Notification dropdown with Mark all read and Test buttons
Frontend: Tradovate SIM status badge in header
seed_data_creation: None required - all tests use API-generated data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features (Calendar Spread, Ratio Spread, AI Auto Strategy Selector, Push Notifications) are fully functional. Tradovate integration is in SIM mode (no API keys configured). Auto Strategy uses rule-based fallback when GPT-4o is unavailable. All existing features from iterations 1-4 continue to work correctly.

mocked_apis.Tradovate: SIM mode - no real API keys configured, returns is_configured: false, connected: false
mocked_apis.Auto Strategy: Uses rule-based fallback when GPT-4o unavailable (source: rules in response)

ratio_spread.params: symbol, option_type, long_strike, short_strike, ratio, expiry_days

auto_strategy_selector.returns: recommended_strategy, confidence, direction_bias, reasoning, risk_level, key_factors
